reviews.comment:
Me gusta, es lindo, tranquilo y muy limpio. Lo único malo es que aunque consumas dentro de su local o pongas nafta, si necesitas el baño te prestan el baño portatil... muy mal

(Translated by Google)
I like it; it's nice, quiet, and very clean. The only bad thing is that even if you buy something inside or fill up your tank, if you need the restroom, they give you a portable toilet... very bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHd3EzZDVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, los baños siempre impecables !!! La empleada de hoy 20 de noviembre a las 11 hs. Muy mal llevada contesta mal

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the bathrooms are always spotless! However, the employee who worked there today, November 20th at 11 am, was very rude and answered questions inappropriately.
